chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ مِنْ أَيْنَ تُؤْخَذُ وَ مِقْدَارِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 172 – The pebbles (for pelting) Al-Jamarahah, from where should these be taken, and their quantity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/143)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/143)
text: يَجُوزُ أَخْذُ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ مِنْ جَمِيعِ الْحَرَمِ إِلَّا مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ وَ مَسْجِدِ الْخَيْفِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Hanan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘It is allowed to take the pebbles (for pelting) Al-Jamarah from all parts of the Harram, except from the Sacred Masjid, and Masjid Al-Khief’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma‘il from Hanan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is permissible to take the pebbles for al-Jamar from all parts of al-Haram (the sacred area) except Masjid al-Haram and Masjid of al-Khif.’”
